# Frontend Focus

- Prioritize user-visible outcomes first: message clarity, CTA hierarchy, mobile responsiveness, and visual coherence.
- When touching layout or visual sections, keep the design direction intentional rather than falling back to generic defaults.
- Use the repo `AGENTS.md` for commands, guardrails, and validation; this file only adds frontend-specific Claude emphasis.
